message.content:
@startuml
title Logg inn system

actor Bruker
participant System
database Database

Bruker ->> System : Trykker logg inn knapp
System -->> Bruker : Send til skjema for innlogging
Bruker ->> System : Send inn e-mail og passord
activate System
System ->> Database : Validere brukerdetaljer
activate Database
db return "Feil Passwd" to Sys 
Sys msg User "Du har oppgit feil passwd. Glemt password?"
User action Glemm Password on sys
sys send form forgot pwd user
user input email address in newform
system verify mail addr db(db ok)
sys sends reset link via emai lto us er(user gets confimation)else[Brugeren eksisterer ikke]db returns not found error message from sytemtousershowingnoaccountexistswiththatemailaddressendifalt [Logginngodkjent]
brugerdetaljegokjentfromdatabasetosystemsendtilinnloggetsideframsysteltillbrukeralternativfeilkombinasjonavopplysningerbrukesforåforsøkeigjenellerhvismanharglemppassordkanmandettevedafylleutskjematildettesomvilføretilepostmeldingsendestildinregistrerteepostadressehvorfra du kan nullstille ditt nåværende kode ordogoppretteetnytt.sistealternativeratduikkehardenneregistrertdegmeddenneadressenhvorvidtdubrukteenannenameellermulighetenforduatdukanskrevetfelaktigitidligere.nårdisseproblemerforekommeskalbeskedenekomme tilbake om hva som gikk galt slik at man vet hvilke korrigering må gjøres før neste forsøk på logging-in-prosess starter igjen..note right of this whole sequence diagram should be considered partofthesamesessionuntilsuccessfulloginoccursorsomeotherexitpointisreachedsuchasclosingbrowserwindowetc...ifneededaddmorestepsbasedonactualrequirementsbutkeepitclearandeasyfollowalongbyanyonewho reads through these interactions between different components involved here including both human users interacting directly themselves plus automated processes running behind scenes without direct intervention required except where explicitly stated otherwise like entering credentials manually each time they want access their account information stored securely within our servers protected against unauthorized attempts gain entry using stolen data obtained elsewhere online perhaps even offline too depending upon how sophisticated attackers become over timewe must remain vigilant always ready adapt quickly changing landscape cybersecurity threats facing organizations large small alike today tomorrow beyond...
@enduml
